values.content:
=Write a short follow-up email for a sales prospect. This is follow-up #{{ $json.emailType === 'follow_up_1' ? '1 (3 days after first contact)' : $json.emailType === 'follow_up_2' ? '2 (1 week later, add value)' : '3 (final check-in, soft close)' }}.

Prospect: {{ $json.Name }}, {{ $json.Company }}
Original outreach was about: AI automation workflows for their business.

Rules:
- Keep it under 80 words
- Don't be pushy
- Follow-up 1: gentle reminder + ask if they had a chance to review
- Follow-up 2: share a relevant insight or tip
- Follow-up 3: last check-in, offer to close the loop

Write only the email body.

meta.description: Automated 3-step follow-up email sequence. Checks daily for leads due for follow-up, uses Claude to write contextual follow-up emails (day 3, day 7, day 14), and sends via Gmail.
meta.author: foryourselfsuryansh-cmd
